# Minimum version

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit integer containing the minimum required version of the specified component.

## Data fields

- **Size**: The number of bytes in this component detect atom.
- **Type**: The type of this atom.
- **Flags**: A 32-bit integer.
- **Component description**: A component description record.

items.description: The number of bytes in this component detect atom.
